untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of prior trend direction (upward vs downward leading to candle) and next-day gap confirmation with 65% statistical context. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and forward-looking gap detection not expressible with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. The 'opening gap confirmation' and 'trade in direction of gap' conditions cannot be translated without forward-looking data or custom pattern detection.
translation_notes: Translated black candle formation as body < 0 (dark/black candle). Entry logic depends on trend context: in uptrends, expect downward breakout (entry_short); in downtrends, expect confirmation (entry_long). Exit reversal on price crossing open. Cannot capture the statistical 65% breakout probability or the critical next-day gap confirmation requirement without pattern recognition beyond allowed indicators.
